name: 海豹短刀（★） | 夜色
descriptionEn: A classic of the Counter-Strike series, the edge of this knife is press-fit Stellite perfectly held in place due to its precise fit with the titanium on the blade's cheek and spine. The handle is fossilized mastodon ivory held in a carbon fibre pocket. It has been spray-painted with a tape mask pattern in a night ops color scheme. Spray... Pray... Paint... Stab.
descriptionZh: 作为反恐精英系列的经典物品，这把刀的刀锋由钴基合金压制，与钛制刀片、龙骨精准结合。整把刀浑然一体。握柄采用了碳纤维包裹的石化乳齿象牙。 这把武器以黑夜配色的纸带图案进行了喷漆。 喷绘... 渲染... 上色... 刺杀。
